{{Quote|What about the Duros? Should we attempt to gain their money as well?|Vadon Leritor|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Vadon Lenitor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and a member of the [[Granse Confederacy]].

==Biography==

The only child of legendary [[ghestslayer]] [[Kalon Lenitor]], she was not raised to become a bounty hunter, but instead was taught to hunt [[Ghest/Legends|ghests]] in the island, south-east of [[Equator City/Legends|Equator City]], where her family lived. She had a difficult childhood, but was raised with loving parents who taught her community sense. Thus, she became an intelligent, hard-working and refined Rodian, with a completely un-Rodian attitude.<ref name="AIR" />

Nevertheless, she left Rodia and became a bounty hunter. She worked for the [[Swinif Organization]] and left with their sympathies; she also was in good terms with several syndicates in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. She was not even wanted by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], because she only claimed bounties for criminals and groups wanted by both the Rebel Alliance and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] - however, [[Task Force on Alliance Security]] would have liked to interrogate her because of her supposed presence in the events that led to the [[Mapuzo break-in]].<ref name="AIR" />

She eventually joined the [[Granse Confederacy]]. Due to her behavior, unusual for a Rodian, she became good friends with Granse leader [[Callandri]].<ref name="AIR" />

She was known to use [[Rodian razor-stick]]s.<ref name="AIR" />
